title: VisualZoneR: A computational protocol for spatial transcriptomics analysis
author: Kerzel, Beretta, et al.

steps.title: Downstream analysis of the data based on the zonation
test1ô <- test1[rev(order(NES))]ô TopResult <- as
steps.instruction: test1ô <- test1[rev(order(NES))]ô TopResult <- as.data.frame(test1[,])[, c(1,2,3,4,5,6,7)]ô TopResult$Cluster <- iô TopResultAllCluster <- rbind(TopResultAllCluster, TopResult)}write.table(xô = TopResultAllCluster, fileô = paste(data_dir, "GSEA_Zones_unique_integrated.res01.txt", sepô = "/"), quoteô = FALSE, row.namesô = TRUE, sepô = "\t")#11b:TopResultAllCluster$Group <- stringr::str_split_fixed(TopResultAllCluster$Cluster, "_", 2)[,1]TopResultAllCluster$Zones <- stringr::str_split_fixed(TopResultAllCluster$Cluster, "_", 2)[,2]orderC <- unique(TopResultAllCluster$Zones)[order(unique(TopResultAllCluster$Zones))]SideColors <- rep(c(rep("darkred",3), rep("red",1), rep("darkgreen",3), rep("green",1)), 3)newName <- function(dfCNES,i) {ô rownames(dfCNES) <- dfCNES[, i]ô dfCNES <- dfCNES[, -(i)]ô return(dfCNES)}for (ix in unique(TopResultAllCluster$Group)) {ô test <- TopResultAllCluster[TopResultAllCluster$Groupô == ix,]ô test <- test[!is.na(test$padj),]ô test <- test[test$padjô <ô 0.05,]ô AllCluster <- unique(test$Zones)ô orgerGO <- unique(test$pathway)ô dfCNES <- data.frame(pathwayô = orgerGO[order(orgerGO)])ô for (i in 1:length(AllCluster)){ô dfC1ô <- test[test$Zonesô == AllCluster[i],]ô dfC1ô <- data.frame(dfC1[order(dfC1$pathway), c(1, 6)])ô colnames(dfC1) <- c("pathway", AllCluster[i])ô dfCNES <- merge(dfCNES, dfC1, byô = 1, allô = T)ô }ô dfCNES <- newName(dfCNES,

steps.instruction: dfCNES <- dfCNES[rowSums(is.na(dfCNES)+0)ô <ô 8,]ô dfCNES[is.na(dfCNES)] <- 0ô finaldf2ô <- as.matrix(dfCNES)ô finaldf2ô <- finaldf2[, orderC]ô nameF <- paste(ix, "uniquezones.txt", sepô = ".")ô assign(nameF, finaldf

steps.title: write
steps.instruction: write.table(xô = finaldf2, fileô = paste(out_dir, nameF, sepô = "/"), quoteô = FALSE, row.namesô = T, sepô = "\t")}#11c:Selected.Terms <- c("GOBP_RESPONSE_TO_TYPE_I_INTERFERON","GOBP_RESPONSE_TO_INTERFERON_GAMMA","GOBP_RESPONSE_TO_VIRUS","GOBP_POSITIVE_REGULATION_OF_CYTOKINE_PRODUCTION","GOBP_T_CELL_ACTIVATION","GOBP_ADAPTIVE_IMMUNE_RESPONSE","GOBP_REGULATION_OF_IMMUNE_EFFECTOR_PROCESS","IL10_RO","HALLMARK_ANGIOGENESIS","HALLMARK_P53_PATHWAY","HALLMARK_EPITHELIAL_MESENCHYMAL_TRANSITION","HALLMARK_ADIPOGENESIS","HALLMARK_PEROXISOME","GOBP_SHORT_CHAIN_FATTY_ACID_METABOLIC_PROCESS","GOBP_LIPID_OXIDATION","HALLMARK_BILE_ACID_METABOLISM")dfNames <- paste0(unique(TopResultAllCluster$Group),".uniquezones.txt")ix3ô <- matrix(nrowô = length(Selected.Terms), ncolô = 0)row.names(ix3) <- Selected.Termsfor (i in dfNames) {ô ix <- read.table(paste(out_dir, i, sepô = "/"), headerô = T, sepô = "\t")ô ix <- ix[rownames(ix) %in% Selected.Terms,]ô diffG <- setdiff(Selected.Terms,rownames(ix))ô diffM <- matrix(rep(0, 8ãlength(diffG)), ncolô =

steps.title: rownames(diffM) <- diffG colnames(diffM) <- colnames(ix)...
steps.instruction: rownames(diffM) <- diffGô colnames(diffM) <- colnames(ix)ô ix2ô <- rbind(ix, diffM)ô ix2ô <- ix2[Selected.Terms,]ô colnames(ix2) <- paste(sub(".uniquezones.txt", "", i), colnames(ix2), sepô = ".")ô ix3ô <- cbind(ix3, ix2)}ix3ô <- as.matrix(ix3)pdf(paste(out_dir, "Heatmap.uniquezones.pdf", sepô = "/"), heighô = 6, widthô = 8)heatmap.2(ix3, marginsô = c(8, 22), colô = viridisLite::viridis(10), cexColô = 1, cexRowô = .8, keysizeô = 1.1, dendrogramô = "none", colsepô = c(8,16), mainô = i, scaleô = "none", Rowvô = F, Colvô = F, ColSideColorsô = SideColors)legend("topright", legendô = c("Inner tumor", "Border tumor", "Peritumor", "Liver"), colô = unique(SideColors), ltyô = 1, lwdô = 5, cexô = .7)dev.off()Figureô 12Heatmap showing GSEA analysis on distinct compartmental zones and treatment cohorts
